default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on CVE launch, CS101 content, and performance analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**CVE Launch Delayed:** The CVE database launch is postponed to next Wednesday, Nov 13, to resolve P1/P0 bugs identified during QA.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [**Aggressive CVE Roadmap:** A new plan will publish 1,000 CVEs/week, starting with high-search-volume entries from 2025 back to 2020 to build a comprehensive database faster.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [**CS101 Content Updates:** A new agentic pipeline is being tested to improve content quality and efficiency. For AI security articles, the team must now include a "prompt section" and highlight SentinelOne's AI Security Posture Management (AI SPM) product.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [**Analytics Discrepancy:** GrowthX's Scrunch report shows SentinelOne leading competitors like CrowdStrike 3x in LLM citations, a finding that differs from SentinelOne's internal Profound platform and requires investigation.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)

## Topics

### CVE Database Launch & Roadmap

  - [**Launch Postponed:** The CVE database launch is moved to next Wednesday, Nov 13.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
      - [**Reason:** To resolve P1 and P0 bugs identified by the QA team.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
      - [**Owner:** Marcus and George Maine are prioritizing these fixes.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [**New Publication Roadmap:** An aggressive plan was proposed to accelerate database growth.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
      - [**Goal:** Publish 1,000 CVEs/week to build a comprehensive database faster.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The publication test showed strong indexing, and a faster pace is needed to keep up with the \~40k entries/year added to public databases.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
      - [**Phased Approach:**](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
        1.  [**Phase 1 (High-Volume):** Publish all CVEs with search volume (2025 → 2020).](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
        2.  [**Phase 2 (No-Volume):** Publish remaining CVEs (2025 → 1999), prioritizing recent entries.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
      - [**New Entries:** A GitHub-Airtable integration will automatically pull new CVEs into the pipeline for weekly publication.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)

### CS101 Content Updates

  - [**Publishing Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
      - [**This Week:** 5 articles are due, with most arriving today.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [**In Review:** 6 articles are with PMM for review and are expected to be cleared early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [**New Agentic Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [**Goal:** Improve content quality and efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [**Function:** Automatically incorporate product specifics, prompt sections, and conclusions, reducing manual post-processing.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [**Status:** Being tested by Marisol and Katya on next week's content.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [**Process Improvement:**](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
      - [**Goal:** Streamline the publishing workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
      - [**Action:** After CVE launch, push CS101 articles directly to Contentstack post-review.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
  - [**Keyword Research Clarification:**](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
      - [**Target Volume:** Minimum 100 US search volume (SEMrush).](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
      - [**Action:** Katya will move two previously rejected keywords (with volumes of 480 and 110) back to "ideas to approve" for re-evaluation.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [**New Content Requirements (from PMM):**](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
      - [**AI Security Articles:** Must include a dedicated "prompt section."](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
      - [**AI Security Articles:** Must highlight SentinelOne's AI Security Posture Management (AI SPM) product.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)

### Analytics & Performance

  - [**LLM Performance (via Scrunch):**](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
      - [**Mentions:** SentinelOne leads competitors in total LLM mentions.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
      - [**Citations:** SentinelOne has 3x more domain citations than CrowdStrike.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
      - [**Placement:** Citations appear early in LLM responses, increasing visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [**Website Performance (via Looker):**](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
      - [**Growth:** Overall and engaged sessions are growing, likely due to the recent Q3 publishing push.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
      - [**Strongest Cluster:** "AI threat landscape and defensive innovation" (13 articles).](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
      - [**Opportunity Cluster:** "Behavioral AI and Autonomous Security" (few articles).](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
  - [**Access Request:**](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
      - [**Request:** Ankit requested view-only access to the Scrunch dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To investigate the discrepancy with SentinelOne's internal Profound platform, which shows different competitor data.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
      - [Add a summary chart to the CVE roadmap document.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
      - [Move two keywords (volumes 480, 110) to "ideas to approve" in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/NAR4xSCsHao_GkYD4aeC5-Gvz9QMtxXH?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
